relationships: kab:Yessaram Tom dakken Mary ad telmed tafṛansist
kab:Ur tessineḍ ara ad temmeslayeḍ tafṛansist neɣ ala﹖
kab:Ur tessinem ara ad temmeslayem tafṛansist neɣ ala﹖
kab:Ur tessinemt ara ad temmeslayemt tafṛansist neɣ ala﹖
kab:Tom ad iɣer tafṛansist aseggas i d-iteddun
kab:Tom ur yettmeslay ara akken ilaq tafṛansist
kab:Nnant-iyi-d ur ssinent ara ad mmeslayent tafṛansist
kab:Mary terra iman-is ur tezmir ara ad temmeslay tafṛansist
kab:Mary testaɛmel ur tezmir ara ad temmeslay tafṛansist
kab:Yiwen deg-neɣ ur yessin ad yemmeslay tafṛansist
